info.name: Jalan Ruang Lingkup Perkerasan Kaku
info.description: API collection for Jalan Ruang Lingkup Perkerasan Kaku (Rigid Pavement Scope) module - Master data for scope of work in rigid/concrete pavement construction

item.name: Query Endpoints
Get All Ruang Lingkup Kaku (with pagination)

request.description:
Get all jalan ruang lingkup perkerasan kaku with optional pagination.

**Roles**: OPD, VERIFIKATOR, ADMIN, SUPERADMIN

**Response**:
```json
{
  "data": [
    {
      "id": 1,
      "jenis": "Perkerasan Beton Semen",
      "createdAt": "...",
      "updatedAt": "..."
    }
  ],
  "page": 1,
  "amount": 10,
  "total": 5,
  "totalPages": 1
}
```

item.name: Get All Ruang Lingkup Kaku (without pagination)

request.description:
Get all jalan ruang lingkup perkerasan kaku without pagination (returns all records).

**Roles**: OPD, VERIFIKATOR, ADMIN, SUPERADMIN

Get single jalan ruang lingkup perkerasan kaku detail by ID.

**Roles**: OPD, VERIFIKATOR, ADMIN, SUPERADMIN

**Response**:
```json
{
  "id": 1,
  "jenis": "Perkerasan Beton Semen",
  "createdAt": "...",
  "updatedAt": "..."
}
```

item.description: Read-only endpoints accessible by all roles

item.name: CRUD Endpoints (SUPERADMIN Only)

request.description:
Create new jalan ruang lingkup perkerasan kaku.

**Role**: SUPERADMIN only

**Body**:
```json
{
  "jenis": "string" // Required - Jenis ruang lingkup
}
```

**Common Values** (Rigid Pavement Scope):
- "Perkerasan Beton Semen" - Cement concrete pavement
- "Lapis Pondasi Agregat Kelas A" - Class A aggregate base course
- "Lapis Pondasi Agregat Kelas B" - Class B aggregate base course
- "Lapis Pondasi Agregat Kelas S" - Class S aggregate base course
- "Pelebaran Perkerasan dan Bahu" - Pavement and shoulder widening
- "Bahu Jalan" - Road shoulder
- "Saluran Samping" - Side drainage
- "Gorong-gorong" - Culvert

**Response**:
```json
{
  "status": "success",
  "responseCode": 201,
  "message": "Jalan Ruang Lingkup Perkerasan Kaku created",
  "data": {
    "id": 1,
    "jenis": "Perkerasan Beton Semen",
    "createdAt": "...",
    "updatedAt": "..."
  }
}
```

Create Class A aggregate base course scope.

**Role**: SUPERADMIN only

Create road shoulder scope.

**Role**: SUPERADMIN only

Create side drainage scope.

**Role**: SUPERADMIN only

Update existing jalan ruang lingkup perkerasan kaku.

**Role**: SUPERADMIN only

**Body**:
```json
{
  "id": number,      // Required - ID to update
  "jenis": string    // Optional - New jenis name
}
```

**Response**:
```json
{
  "status": "success",
  "responseCode": 200,
  "message": "Jalan Ruang Lingkup Perkerasan Kaku updated",
  "data": {
    "id": 1,
    "jenis": "Perkerasan Beton Semen (Updated)",
    "createdAt": "...",
    "updatedAt": "..."
  }
}
```

Soft delete jalan ruang lingkup perkerasan kaku.

**Role**: SUPERADMIN only

**Body**:
```json
{
  "id": number  // Required - ID to delete
}
```

**Response**:
```json
{
  "status": "success",
  "responseCode": 200,
  "message": "Jalan Ruang Lingkup Perkerasan Kaku deleted",
  "data": true
}
```

**Note**: This is a soft delete. The record will be marked as deleted but not removed from database.

item.description: Create, Update, Delete operations - Only accessible by SUPERADMIN
